meta.title: Giulia Ye — Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Giulia Ye, a Full Stack Developer focused on software craftsmanship and building fast, accessible, and well-crafted web experiences.
meta.author: Giulia Ye

items.description: Software developer at a fast-growing startup, building a cloud-based web application with a focus on clean code and scalable architecture, in close contact with business stakeholders.
highlights: Develop and maintain a cloud-based web application in a fast-paced startup environment using Trunk Based Development for CI/CD.
Apply Domain-Driven Design and Extreme Programming principles, including regular pair programming, to deliver clean, scalable, and testable code.
Build and optimize a Node.js backend with TypeScript and NestJS, leveraging Domain-Driven Design for modular and maintainable architecture.
Leading frontend development on a responsive React application with a strong focus on user experience.

items.description: Delivered clean, maintainable software by applying Extreme Programming practices within agile teams.
highlights: Developed microservices in Rust and frontend interfaces in Elm for an innovative insurtech startup.
Led frontend development for a cloud-native AWS application for a major publishing company, ensuring scalability and reliability.

items.description: Internship focused on learning software development and improving existing B2B and e-commerce platforms.
highlights: Maintained and improved B2B and e-commerce platforms built with Java, Spring Boot, and Vue.js.
Troubleshot and resolved software bugs, improving overall system reliability and user experience.

about.description: Hello! My name is Giulia, I'm a developer who learns new languages just to contribute to open-source projects I love.
about.subtitle: A few things about me:
items: Currently typing away on a Sweep Bling LP. If you're curious here's my current layout.
Tinkering with the perfect dev setup: living the dream with NixOS and Neovim as I fine-tune my workflow.
Love running along Rimini's seafront, especially at sunrise.
Bouldering enthusiast, always up for a challenge.
